content: I will overwrite [src/components/CinematicPortal.tsx](file:///C:/Users/Nicácio/Documents/securify/src/components/CinematicPortal.tsx) using the file-write tool. This is a clean way to apply the complete mobile improvements and scroll indicators for the "Efeito Festa" section.
